goal: The ledger needs a typed, well-tested money-rounding utility. As the Solution Architect, scope it; then the team must IMPLEMENT it: add src/features/ledger/lib/round.ts with roundMoney(value, currency) (banker's rounding to currency minor units, NaN/Infinity-safe) plus unit tests covering edge cases (negative, zero, 0.005 half-even, very large). The engineer writes the code + tests and keeps the suite green; do not stop at a plan.
acceptance_hint: A real typed round.ts + edge-case tests, suite green, implemented by the engineer (Dev Clone). Validates the 6-role improved composition end-to-end.
